package main

import "fmt"
import "math"
func main() {
	var x1,y1,x2,y2 float64
	fmt.Scan(&x1,&y1,&x2,&y2)
	dx := x2-x1
	dy := y2-y1
	soma := dx * dx + dy *dy
	distancia := math.Sqrt(soma) 
	fmt.Printf("%.2f\n",distancia)
}
